edges.mechanism: CCA1 directly represses PRR9 evening transcription as part of the morning-loop reciprocal regulation; cca1 mutants show derepressed PRR9
edges.evidence_sentence: CCA1 and LHY directly repress evening genes including PRR9, completing the core circadian feedback loop

edges.mechanism: CCA1 represses PRR7 promoter at dusk
edges.evidence_sentence: CCA1 and LHY directly repress evening genes

edges.mechanism: LHY represses PRR9 redundantly with CCA1
edges.evidence_sentence: CCA1 and LHY directly repress evening genes including PRR9

edges.mechanism: PIF4 indirectly upregulates BR-signaling components by activating shared elongation modules; BAK1 transcriptionally responds to PIF4 indirectly
edges.evidence_sentence: BR-PIF4-BZR1 module integration includes feedback to BR receptor genes

edges.mechanism: ELF3 is the bridging subunit of the Evening Complex (with ELF4 and LUX)
edges.evidence_sentence: ELF3 is both necessary and sufficient to form a complex between ELF4 and LUX

edges.mechanism: ELF4 is a subunit of the Evening Complex
edges.evidence_sentence: ELF4-ELF3-LUX complex forms the Evening Complex

edges.mechanism: LUX is the DNA-binding MYB-like subunit of the Evening Complex
edges.evidence_sentence: LUX targets the complex to promoters of PIF4 and PIF5

edges.mechanism: GAI is a DELLA family member contributing to the DELLA repressor pool
edges.evidence_sentence: GAI and RGA are closely related DELLA-family GA-signaling repressors

edges.mechanism: RGA is the dominant DELLA family member in stem/hypocotyl elongation
edges.evidence_sentence: RGA is the predominant DELLA negative regulator of elongation

edges.mechanism: RGL1 is a DELLA family member contributing to growth repression
edges.evidence_sentence: RGL family includes RGL1, RGL2, RGL3 acting as DELLA repressors

edges.mechanism: RGL2 is a DELLA family member, dominant in seed germination
edges.evidence_sentence: RGL2 is up-regulated following imbibition and acts as DELLA repressor

edges.mechanism: RGL3 is a DELLA family member contributing to growth repression

perturbations.evidence_sentence: yuc2589 strongly suppressed shade response, with YUC8 contributing significantly to PIF7-driven elongation
bbx22 mutant shows slightly elongated hypocotyl in light, opposite to BBX21
bbx24 mutants show reduced shade-induced hypocotyl elongation
PHYB-OX seedlings show shorter hypocotyls than WT in red and white light
phyB null mutant has constitutively elongated hypocotyl
Brassinolide treatment promotes hypocotyl elongation in WT seedlings via BRI1-BZR1
